{{linked}}Powers and Principalities are institutions such as [[online dating]] which control our lives and lead us astray. They are the tools of [[Archons]]. They enhance the [[nine plagues]].<ref name=":0" />
[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[sn:Principalities and Powers]][[Category:Archons]]
[[Category:Conspirituality]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Principalities and Powers]][[sn:Principalities and Powers]][[Category:Psychology]]

This page needs to be split into an article on [[conspirituality]] and [[conjunction bias]] and one on archons and their effects on society.

Powers and Principalities are institutions such as [[online dating]] which control our lives and lead us astray. They enhance the [[Seven Plagues]].<ref name=":0">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RZvBadGqEbM</ref>

[[Conspirituality]] and general [[conspiracy theories]] are a product of an incorrect reaction ot the powers and principalities. Things like the conjunction bias make them happen<ref name=":0" />

== Etymology==
The term comes from Ephesians 3:10<ref name=":1">https://biblehub.com/ephesians/3-10.htm</ref>
{{Quote|To the intent that now unto the principalities and powers in heavenly places might be known by the church the manifold wisdom of God|Ephesians 3:10<ref name=":1" />}}

==See Also<!-- this is a mess because it was a hard split on the original wiki and the [[Great November Outage]] removed the split and it needs to be redone-->==
* [[Conspirituality]]
* [[Category:Psychology]] [[Category:Archons]] [[Conjunction bias]] discussing the way conspiracy theories work

== Conjunction bias reading list ==

* https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1002/acp.2995
* https://netcollegeprep.com/2019/12/03/conjunction-fallacy-a-tool-of-conspiracy-theories/
* https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/understand-overcome-bias-18-marc-bond
* https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/epdf/10.1002/acp.2995
* https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/34518736/
* https://slate.com/technology/2016/12/the-conjunction-fallacy-explains-why-fake-news-is-believable.html
* https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1002/acp.2995

== References ==
[[Category:Pages]]
